title: Zoro Enters the Sword Shop
description: On pages 1–4, zoro enters the sword shop focuses on Zoro, Tashigi, Nami, Luffy as the crew reaches Loguetown, where Zoro searches for swords and runs into Tashigi.
scene: On pages 1–4, zoro enters the sword shop focuses on Zoro, Tashigi, Nami, Luffy as the crew reaches Loguetown, where Zoro searches for swords and runs into Tashigi.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: OHHHHHHHH! It suits you wonderfully, miss!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So will you be buying all this, miss?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I want something a little more casual,

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: That's easier to move around in.'

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So that's where the great pirate King,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The place where the greatest pirate in history,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Looks way too much like Kuna.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Not only that, she's a swordsman as well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Well, it is a big world, after all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: At least I won't ever run into her anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Damn it, I still can't get over it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'd like to purchase a sword.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Please feel free to look around as much as you want.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: After all, this is a well- established store that's been in business for over 200 years!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We've got antique swords, new swords, and the latest swords in fashion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So he's just some Penni- less trash.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: If you're looking to buy one sword each for around 50,000, I've only got blunt pieces of trash to sell,

summary: This part gives Zoro a major equipment and character moment while Loguetown’s Marines begin to matter.
